participants.name: Jalen Farmer
participants.notes: Combine invitee. Combine measurements and drills listed. Did not participate in bench or agility testing at Combine; expected to do so at pro day. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Seth McGowan
participants.notes: Combine invitee. 42.5-inch vertical was second-best all-time for RBs at the Combine. Posted poor shuttle at Combine; expected to re-test agilities at pro day. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Jager Burton
participants.notes: Combine invitee. Listed as center prospect. Did not participate in shuttle drills at Combine; expected to do agilities and bench at pro day. 9.91 RAS (7th all-time among centers). Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Kendrick Law
participants.notes: Combine invitee. Transfer from Alabama. Did not do agility testing at Combine; scheduled to do agilities (cone, shuttle) at pro day. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Joshua Braun
participants.notes: Combine invitee. 6-6, 325. Did not run the 40, vertical, or short shuttle at Combine. Multi-stop transfer (Florida, Arkansas, Kentucky). Expected to do additional testing at pro day. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: David Gusta
participants.notes: Combine invitee. 9.75 RAS. 37 bench reps, elite 10-yard split (1.68) at Combine. Transfer from Washington State. Agilities left to run at pro day. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Kam Olds
participants.notes: PFF Predictive Big Board Rank 431. Not a Combine invitee. Pro day was first opportunity for official testing. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Zach Calzada
participants.notes: PFF Predictive Big Board Rank 434. Incarnate Word transfer who started for Kentucky in 2025. Not a Combine invitee. Pro day was first opportunity for official testing. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Ja'Mori Maclin
participants.notes: PFF Predictive Big Board Rank 435. Former North Texas transfer. Not a Combine invitee. Pro day was first opportunity for official testing. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: Zion Childress
participants.notes: Not a Combine invitee. Participated in Hula Bowl. Veteran safety with experience at safety and nickel. Pro day was first opportunity for official testing. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

participants.name: J.J. Weaver
participants.notes: Not a Combine invitee. Participated in Hula Bowl. Sixth-year veteran with 2,446 career defensive snaps. Louisville Moore HS product. Pro day was first opportunity for official testing. Pro day-specific results not yet published.

additional_notes: The Kentucky 2026 Pro Day was held on March 11, 2026 at the Nutter Field House in Lexington, KY beginning at 11:00 AM ET. Fourteen UK alumni were announced as participants. The scheduled drills included measurements (height, weight), vertical jump, broad jump, 225-lb bench press rep test, 40-yard dash, short shuttle, 3-cone shuttle, and position-specific drills (DB, OL, DL, LB/RB). Six Kentucky players (Burton, Braun, Farmer, McGowan, Law, Gusta) attended the NFL Scouting Combine and their combine measurements/results are included above as baseline data. Several Combine invitees were expected to complete drills they skipped in Indianapolis (e.g., Burton shuttle/agilities, Farmer bench/agilities, Law agilities, Braun 40/vertical, Gusta agilities). The remaining participants (Olds, Calzada, Maclin, Childress, Weaver, and potentially others) did not attend the Combine and pro day was their first opportunity for official measurements and testing. The PFF tracker listed 9 prospects by name for Kentucky's pro day; On3/KSR previews indicated additional participants including Childress and Weaver. UK Athletics announced 14 total participants but the full list beyond the names identified above has not been confirmed in available sources. CRITICAL NOTE: As of March 12, 2026, actual pro day testing results have NOT yet been published online. The event was held just yesterday. The combine data included for the six invitees is from the NFL Scouting Combine (late February/early March 2026), not from the pro day itself. This record should be updated once pro day-specific results are published by UK Athletics, beat reporters, or draft media outlets. Buffalo Bills RB Ray Davis and former OL Logan Stenberg were on-site as roaming reporters. Indoor facility (Nutter Field House).
